programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Biscuits & Invention Test: Mexican
programme.desc: In a Mexican-themed Invention Test Julia chooses a cactus and a prickly pear as the core ingredient.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Kath, Andrew and Julia were faced with the task of reproducing Maggie Beer's Upside Down Grape Cake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - mmunity Challenge: Shaun Presland
programme.desc: Mindy goes up against Sake head chef Shaun Presland in a Raw Food Immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Leftovers
programme.desc: The teams were tasked with creating a three-course fundraising dinner for charity organisation OzHarvest.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Poultry
programme.desc: A Red Team elimination challenge begins with a "name that bird" round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 4
programme.desc: Gary begins another MasterClass with his recipe for barbecue chicken.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Flavour Matching & Invention Test: Seduction
programme.desc: The mystery box challenge features a number of seemingly disparate ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Salamanca Market
programme.desc: Tasmania Week begins with a four-team Market Stall Challenge, which took place at Salamanca Markets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Fishing For Salmon Challenge & Philippe Leban
programme.desc: The winning team members cook off for the right to compete in an immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Contestants are split into 2 teams and are tasked with hosting afternoon tea for 100 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pub Lunch
programme.desc: Nine contestants on the losing team face elimination challenges that include three knockout rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 5
programme.desc: In a masterclass edition, Gary cooks a succulent roasted pork rack with braised vegetables.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box & Seafood from Around the World with Rick Stein
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are given a single egg and asked to make it the hero of their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Greek Salad
programme.desc: Characters: 0 | Words: 0 Dalvinder, Audra and Andrew are given 3.5 hours to reproduce George's 'Greek Salad'.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Jamie Oliver
programme.desc: Jules, Alice and Tregan are the three lucky contestants who face off against renowned chef Jamie Oliver.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Shangri La Hotel 24-Hour Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants faced a 24-Hour Team Challenge, running a day's service at the Shangri-La hotel in Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: The losing red team heads back to the kitchen, where the teammates face a rapid fire Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 6
programme.desc: Paul Wilson creates a traditional Mexican mole with lamb cutlets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: MasterChef Australia Winners
programme.desc: Past MasterChef winners Julie, Adam and Kate return to the kitchen for an all-star mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Quiche Lorraine
programme.desc: Wade, Emma and Filippo had to recreate Gary's Quiche Lorraine without the aid of a recipe.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Hamish Ingham
programme.desc: Audra, winner of the Mega Mystery Box Challenge is determined to win an immunity pin

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Hindu Wedding
programme.desc: Two teams face their toughest challenge yet and cater for a Sri-Lankan Hindu wedding with a vegetarian menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Cake
programme.desc: The red team enjoy a special masterclass courtesy of Giovanni Pilu.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: A mom-to-be tries to find one of five million-dollar cases, and surprises her husband.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 7
programme.desc: In a French food-themed masterclass, Gary cooks a beautiful French onion soup.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Soup & Invention Test - Dude Food
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box Challenge contestants are given 60 minutes to make a soup of their choice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Christine Manfield
programme.desc: Christine Manfield lifts the cloche on a highly complex smoked river trout.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Daniel Wilson
programme.desc: Tregan competes in an immunity challenge against professional chef Daniel Wilson.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Home Cooking
programme.desc: The contestants must put on their best displays of home cooking with ingredients at the Masterchef House.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Quick Fire Cook-Off
programme.desc: The losing contestants face a challenge in which they must create a dish from a range of possible ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 8
programme.desc: The contestants cap off another tough week with a masterclass on beautiful Kangaroo Island.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Invention Test: Heston Blumenthal
programme.desc: Contestants return to the kitchen for a very big surprise.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Vincent Gadan
programme.desc: Guest chef Vincent Gadan sets a tricky pressure test for three of the budding chefs Amina, Adam and Beau.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Tomislav Martinovic
programme.desc: Kylie fights for immunity against renowned chef Tomislav Martinovic.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Team Challenge: Pop-up Restaurants
programme.desc: The team challenge sees the reds and blues tasked to create their own pop up restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Double Elimination
programme.desc: Marco Pierre White mentors 6 contestants, and oversees a double elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 9
programme.desc: The contestants enjoy their first masterclass as members of 2012's Top 10.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Invention Test: Rome
programme.desc: It's a Roman holiday for the top 10 contestants as they begin 'Italy week'.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Pasta & Pizza
programme.desc: The contestants compete in a pizza and pasta challenge, cooking lunch for 120 hungry Roman diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Antonio Carluccio
programme.desc: Before Mindy and Alice face off in an immunity challenge, they enjoy a 'taste tour' of Florence.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Risotto Challenge with Gualtiero Marchesi
programme.desc: The Top Ten contestants make their way to Parma to cook off in a risotto challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Feast in Monticchelo
programme.desc: The elimination challenge sees five contestants head to Tuscany, to cook for locals in Monticchelo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 10
programme.desc: 'Italy Week' concludes with another delicious masterclass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Fridge Ingredients
programme.desc: Gary makes a shock announcement.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Grant King
programme.desc: Three of the hopefuls are challenged to cook crispy scaled snapper with calamari crackling.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Kylie Kwong
programme.desc: For the week's second elimination, the contestants must recreate a mouth-watering Kylie Kwong dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Team Challenge: Edible Centrepiece
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must produce a French-inspired dessert in just one hour.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: NASCAR's Jimmie Johnson drops by to meet a player from Rhode Island.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: The Banker offers a Detroit video-game fan the chance to become a game character.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: A pharmacy technician competes.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP6
programme.desc: A newly married woman from Kansas City, Kan., plays a game with six $1 million cases.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Seven $1 million cases are in the mix for a male nurse from Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP8
programme.desc: Eight $1 million cases are added to a Minnesota woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP9
programme.desc: Nine $1 million cases are on the line for a New Jersey woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: A teacher from Pennsylvania returns to finish her game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP13
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP83
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP31
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP25
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP22
programme.desc: 4 contestants, from Ohio, Connecticut and 2 from California - battle it out in a special speed game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - I'm Dancin' Here!
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with new twists and turns!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - High Value Family
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with life-changing money on the line!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - There's Snow Place Like Home
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA
